title: How to duplicate a folder and all its contents?
excerpt: Would like to duplicate a folder in a workspace with all the sub folders and its contents. How to go about it?

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like to duplicate a folder in a workspace with all the sub folders and its contents. How to go about it?

posts.author: malikg1122 (Malik Sohail)
posts.cookedHtml:
To duplicate a folder and all its contents on Windows:

  1. Open File Explorer and go to the folder you want to duplicate.
  2. Right-click the folder and select Copy (or press Ctrl + C).
  3. Go to the location where you want the duplicate.
  4. Right-click and select Paste (or press Ctrl + V).
  5. The folder and its contents will be duplicated in the new location.

You can also drag the folder while holding the Ctrl key to copy it.

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: @malikg1122 I am talking about the folder structure in Monday.com, not on Windows
